text:
Garv Rawat
+91 8527683067|rawatgarv46@gmail.com |LinkedIn |GitHub
Summary
Aspiring AI/ML engineer with hands-on experience building and deploying machine learning models, NLP pipelines, and
LLM-powered applications. Proficient in Python, Scikit-learn, LangChain, and Flask for end-to-end model development
and API deployment. Experienced in full-stack development with React.js and Node.js, enabling seamless integration of AI
models into production web applications.
Education
V ellore Institute of T echnology , ChennaiChennai, Tamil Nadu
B.Tech in Electronics and Computer Engineering|CGPA: 9.06 2023 – Expected May 2027
Ryan International School, Greater NoidaGreater Noida, Uttar Pradesh
Senior Secondary – Class 12 (CBSE)|Percentage: 92.6% 2021 – 2022
Ryan International School, Greater NoidaGreater Noida, Uttar Pradesh
Secondary – Class 10 (CBSE)|Percentage: 87.2% 2019 – 2020
Relevant Skills
AI & Machine Learning: Scikit-learn, NLP, TF-IDF, Logistic Regression, Random Forest, Sentence Transformers,
Model Evaluation (F1, Precision, Recall)
LLM & RAG: LangChain, ChromaDB, Groq (LLaMA 3), Retrieval-Augmented Generation, Semantic Search, Vector
Embeddings
W eb Development: React.js, Node.js, Express.js, Flask, REST APIs, Socket.io, HTML, CSS
Data Science: Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib, EDA, Feature Engineering, Data Cleaning
Databases: MongoDB, MySQL, ChromaDB
T ools: Git, Docker, Joblib, VS Code, Vite, Jupyter Notebook
Projects
DocChat – Multi-Document RAG Application|Python, LangChain, ChromaDB, Flask, React.js, Groq
• Built a multi-document RAG pipeline using LangChain and ChromaDB that enables semantic Q&A across multiple
PDFs simultaneously, retrieving the top-3 most relevant chunks per query using cosine similarity over
sentence-transformer embeddings (all-MiniLM-L6-v2).
• Implemented conversation memory with a 10-message sliding window, per-document chat history isolation, and
source citations showing document name and page number for every answer.
• Deployed a 6-endpoint Flask REST API supporting PDF upload, document management, single-document chat,
cross-document search, 2-document comparison, and history reset – integrated with a React.js frontend.
SocialSphere – AI-Powered Social Networking App|React.js, Node.js, Python, Flask, Scikit-learn, Socket.io, MongoDB
• Trained a TF-IDF + Logistic Regression sentiment classifier on 50,000 IMDB reviews achieving 88%+ accuracy (F1:
0.88), deployed via Flask REST API to automatically label social media posts as positive or negative in real time.
• Implemented real-time private messaging and instant follow notifications using Socket.io, supporting 50+
concurrent connections with sub-100ms event delivery.
• Built full-stack social platform with JWT authentication, image post feed, follow/unfollow system, and live online
friends sidebar using React.js, Node.js, Express.js, and MongoDB.
Certifications & Achievements
